name: motogiathinh-ctv-mobile
description: Moto Gia Thịnh — CTV portal, native (Capacitor) wrapper of the web CTV portal.

scripts.sync: node build.mjs && cap sync && node patch-native.mjs
scripts.android: node build.mjs && cap sync android && cap open android
scripts.ios: node build.mjs && cap sync ios && node patch-native.mjs && cap open ios
